primary_contract: nwau_py.emergency_grouper integration boundary for precomputed UDG/AECC outputs and licensed external grouper or mapping-service workflows, with registry-driven era selection and provenance capture
licensing_caveats: Do not embed or redistribute licensed emergency grouper tables, manuals, or mapping bundles unless the source license explicitly permits it.
Do not invent UDG-to-AECC crosswalks or silently convert between eras without registry-backed provenance and declared source evidence.
Keep user-supplied or locally licensed reference artifacts outside the repository unless they are synthetic or otherwise redistributable.
description: Define a safe emergency classification grouper integration roadmap for UDG/AECC derivation through precomputed inputs or licensed external command, service, or file-exchange workflows.
